EmailTemplate.name: AES - Self-booking Final Reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Final reminder to schedule a call with Alliance Extra Staff
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WE'D LOVE TO CONTINUE YOUR JOURNEY WITH US.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We noticed you haven't booked in a time to discuss your application. As a final reminder, please let us know when is a good time for us to contact you.
BOOK A CALL WITH A RECRUITER
If we don't hear back from you, we will assume you're no longer interested in the position and will remove your application.
Please feel free to resubmit your interest in the future, should your circumstances change.
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
